headlines.title: Bryan Woo returns to dominance in Seattle Mariners win over Braves
headlines.summary: Bryan Woo pitched six scoreless, one-hit innings to lead the Mariners to a 3-1 win that clinched a series victory over the MLB-leading Atlanta Braves. Julio Rodriguez contributed with a 436-foot solo home run.

headlines.title: Mariners take series from MLB-leading Braves
headlines.summary: The Mariners won the series finale 3-1 against the Atlanta Braves on May 6, securing a series victory against one of baseball's top teams.

last_game.highlights: Bryan Woo dominated with 6 scoreless innings. Julio Rodriguez hit a 436-foot solo home run. Mariners clinched series victory over MLB-leading Braves.

headlines.title: Seahawks 2026 schedule to be released on May 14
headlines.summary: The NFL will unveil the 2026 regular season schedule on May 14 at 8 p.m. ET. The Seahawks, as defending Super Bowl champions, will host the Week 1 NFL Kickoff game on September 9.

headlines.title: Seahawks 2026 OTA and minicamp dates announced
headlines.summary: Organized Team Activities (OTAs) will take place on May 26, May 28-29, June 1, and June 3-4. Mandatory minicamp dates have also been set for later this spring.

last_game.highlights: Seahawks won Super Bowl LX to conclude the 2025 season. Currently in offseason with OTAs beginning May 26.

headlines.title: Seattle Kraken eliminated from playoff contention for 3rd straight season
headlines.summary: The Kraken were officially eliminated from playoff contention on April 11, 2026, marking three consecutive seasons without postseason qualification.

headlines.title: Kraken earn No. 7 overall pick in 2026 NHL Draft
headlines.summary: Seattle secured the 7th overall pick in the 2026 NHL Draft Lottery, their third-highest pick in franchise history. The team also possesses another first-round pick from Tampa Bay.

last_game.highlights: Kraken finished the 2025-26 season sixth-last in the NHL, winning only 7 of their final 23 games. Season ended April 11 with elimination from playoff contention.

headlines.title: Seattle Sounders FC 2026 MLS schedule released
headlines.summary: MLS unveiled the full 2026 regular season schedule. All matches will air live on Apple TV with no blackouts. The season includes a six-week break for the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

last_game.highlights: Sounders currently in 2026 MLS season with 17 wins, 10 losses, 9 draws. Season includes World Cup break in May-June.

headlines.title: Golden State Valkyries defeat Seattle Storm 91-80 in season opener
headlines.summary: The expansion Golden State Valkyries spoiled the Storm's home opener, winning 91-80 at Climate Pledge Arena. Janelle Salaun led the Valkyries with 20 points.

headlines.title: Seattle Storm opens 2026 WNBA season
headlines.summary: The Storm began their 2026 campaign on May 8 against the expansion Golden State Valkyries. The team features new head coach Sonia Raman and a new roster.

last_game.highlights: Storm lost their home opener to the expansion Valkyries. New head coach Sonia Raman's first regular season game with the team.
